titleStmt.title: SII 9.329: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 329. (A.R. No. 123 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SURYANARAYANASVAMI TEMPLE AT MAGALA, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription is dated Śaka 1131, Śukla, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Sōmavāra, Sōmagrahaṇa, Karkaṭaka-saṅkrmaṇa, Vyatīpāta, corresponding to A.D. 1209 July 18 Saturday when there was a lunar eclipse; the week-day cited in the record is an error. The record refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vishṇuvardhana Ballāḷa (II), who was ruling over Gaṅgavāḍi ninetysix-thousand, Noṇaṁbavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand Banavase twelve-thousand, Huligeṟe three-hundred, the two Beḷuvalas, and Māsavāḍi up to Herdoṟe. When he was camping at Haḷḷavura surnamed Vijayasamudra, Marmarasa, son of the Brāhman Kāḷimayya, who was one of the 200 Brāhman svāmis of Māṅgoḷa, built a trkiūṭa temple for the gods Śiva, Vishṇu and Sūrya; and Siṅgayya, who was the Bhaṇḍāri and the 200 Mahājanas of Māṅgoḷa made grants of land (boundaries specified) for the service of the gods. The arasu title borne by the Brāhman Marma is noteworthy. The warlike spirit of the 200 Brāhmans is described as that of Indra in war The genealogies of the king, of Marmarasa and of Siṅgamayya are given. It also records other gifts made to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīrjjayābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi . caṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha (.) mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
jayatyāviḥkritaṁ viṣṇō . rvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra . viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya .
śrīsōmēśaḥ sadā pāyā . tprasaṁnaḥ kēśavō vibhuḥ . bhāskaraḥ suravikhyātaḥ marmarājaṁ mahāprabhuṁ . śrīśaṁkara .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaran . dvāravatīpuravarādhīśvaran yāda
vakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi . samyaktacūḍāmaṇi . malerājarāja . maleparoḷgaḍa . kadanapracaṁḍa . nēkā ṁgavīra . nasahāya
śauryya . śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla . caladaṁkarāma . niśśaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa viṣṇuvarddhanavīraballāḷudēvana rā
jānvayameṁteṁdaḍe . vritta . sarasijanētraniṁdabjasaṁbhavanaṁbujasaṁbhavānkaniṁ varamenipattriyattriya viḷōcanadiṁdame sōma sō
maniṁ suruciramāda sōmavibhavānvaya bhūpa yaduprabhākhyaniṁ sthiramadu yādavāhvayakuḷōdbhavamādudu
bhūtaḷāgradoḷu . yaduvaṁśāṁbarabhānu dakṣiṇadharādhīśā(ṁ)nvayaṁ pēḷvaḍaṁtadu vaicitryamadeṁtuṭiṁdaḍe nṛpapra
khyātaśōbhākarāspadanōrbbaṁ saḷaneṁba bhūpati himāṁśucchāyeyaṁ tāḷditendada nōḍalu śaśakāpurakke mu
dadiṁ baṁdaṁ kumārōttamaṁ . baṁdu kulādhidēvate vasantakiyaṁghrisarōjamaṁ kubhṛnnaṁdananarccisuttami
raludghanakhāstranaḍurttu pāye sidhdhaṁ dayeyiṁde koṭṭa seḷeyiṁ puliyaṁ mige poysaḷeṁdoḍāṭaṁdalinitta hoysa
ṇakuḷānvayarādariḷātaḷāgradoḷu . kanda . viḷasadviśiṣṭahṛdbyākuḷada tamam pareye hoysaṇānvayabhū
bhritkuḷadiṁdamogedu nijabhujabalade jagaccakṣuvenipa vinayādityaṁ . vinayādityana rājyadinanantaram nikhiḷadhātri
geṟeyaṁ tāneṁbanitu guṇadātmajaṁ bhūvinutaṁ rājyaprayuktaneṟeyaṁganṛpaṁ . kṣitipatiyaṟeyaṁ
gudyatsati yēcaladēvigātmajarpuṭṭidarappratimataraviṣṇuvarddhana nutanudayādityabhūpa ballāḷanṛpaṁ .
mattamavaroḷage viṣṇuvarddhanadēvaṁge paṭṭaṁ . śrīviṣṇuvarddhanaṁgaṁ bhūviśśrute lakṣmidēvigaṁ puṭṭida kīrttyāvanitegadhipa yadukuḷadēvaṁ
vairībhakuḷanṛsiṁhanarēṁdraṁ . Ā narasiṁhanṛpaṁgaṁ pīnastane paṭṭadarasi yēcaladēvibhūnutege puṭṭidaṁ kṣitipānamna
padābja vīraballāḷanṛpaṁ . Ātana parākramameṁtteṁdaḍe . vritta . vidviṣṭabrātejātakṣitipativijitāśēṣavikrāntabā
huḥ . sadvidyāphrauḍhagūḍhaprabhavanikhiḷaśastrāstrasaṁpāditākhya . tadvikhyātaprasannaprakaṭadiktaṭālambitōdyadvibhāsaḥ .
sadvākyē sūryyasūnurvvijayati bhuvanē vīraballāḷabhūpaḥ . caladaṁkarāmanarinripakuḷakurusaṁdōhabhīmanuddhatarā
maṁ lalanākadaṁbakāmaṁ malerājapratimanatibaḷaṁ ballāḷaṁ . Ā ballāḷamahīpāḷaṁ gaṁgavāḍi toṁbattaṟusāsira noṇaṁbavā
ḍi mūvatichāyira banavase pannichāyira huligeṟe mūnūṟu beḷuvalaveraḍu māsavāḍi heddoṟeparyyantaṁbaravāḷutta vijaya
samudra(ṁ)menipa haḷḷavura nelavīḍina biṭṭirdu duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapatripāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhadi rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu ©
tatpādapadmōpajīvi . bhaṇḍārisindaviprēśa . bhavatō rājyasampadā . viduṣāmartthisārtthānām . kalpavrikṣāyitam bhuvi . kanda . pāḷa
ḍavigaḷūrādapuvāḷuva kāluvaḷḷi nagaravādapuvene tāṁ pāḷisuvanurbbiyaṁ ballāḷana bhaṁḍāri siṁganaṁ bayasadarāru . Ōṁ nama .
© svasti śrīmadanavaratasuruciraviḷasadamaḷakamanīyajagadvaḷayakaḷitabahaḷāyamāna dugdhārṇnavanavarucirakāntikā
ntādhakkārasauṁdaritasphuritacaṁdrātapavarṇnanirnniktavyaktataraśōbhākarasatkīrttilakṣmīmukhakumudavikāsēṁduprabharuṁ . nikhiḷamanu
munisannibharuṁ . yamaniyamaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāranijakrityakriyākaraṇānuraktasvāṁtaḥkaraṇapariṇativiśēṣa
parākritapratyavāyaruṁ . satyarādhēyaruṁ . manōharāyamānadakṣiṇabhūkāntākacarucirasaṁśōbhitakuntaḷadēśamadhyava
rttiyaśōvarttinoṇubavāḍidvātrimśatsahasrābhidhānaśirōratnāyamānamāṁgoḷagrāmādhipatigaḷuṁ pratyakṣasarasvatigaḷuṁ
śrīmadvarāhadēvaprōdbhūtatuṁgabhadrājaḷasnānapavittīkritagātraruṁ . vibdhapaṁkajamitraruṁ śrīmadakhiḷadivijamauḷi
maṇḍanamaṇiprabhāvikasitapādāravindadvandvaśrīyōbhagavatōnṛkēsararanavaratapūjātatpararuṁ . mērusannibha
sthiraruṁ . kuṭiḷakumataparavādinirddaḷitapaṭutaraprakaṭitanikhiḷavidyānikētanasarasvatīniṭaḷajaṭiḷitatiḷakāyamānakaṭa
kamarddanadēvaṇākhyapraviṣṭādhiṣṭhita śiṣṭasaṁvarddhanaprasannarinnūrvvarsvāmigaḷa satkīrttiyanteṁdaḍe . vritta . tyāgē kaḷpamahī
rhassulalitaḥ svātmōpabhōgē hariḥ . sāhaṁkārasamagrasaukhyavibhavē saṁkrandanassaṁyyugē . śrautasmārttaniyuktakarmmaniya
tau byāsōpamaḥ sarbbadā . śrīmanmāgoḷada dvijātinivahaḥ samstūyatē bhūtaḷē . parahitarāgiyuṁ parabhayaṁkararuṁ . haribha
ktarāgiyuṁ sphuritaharipratāparakhiḷadvijarājasamākhyarāgiyurbbarege kaḷaṁkadōṣarahitardvijarājaru māgoḷādhiparnnaraha
ripādapaṁkaruhaṣaṭpadarī dviśatadvijōttamaru . Ā Innūrvvara priyaputra sameyadagaruḍa marmmarasananvaya . maṁdā
krāṁta . bhāradvājapravarajanitaḥ padmanābhasya sūnurjānakyākhyāḥ prathitataneyaḥ puṇa puṁjaprabhāvaḥ . śrīmaddhātrītiḷakaviḷasanmāgo
ḷagrāmaśōbhāprakhyaḥ prājñaḥ prakaṭitayaśaḥ kāḷimayyadvijēśaḥ . vri . Ā prabhu kāḷimayyana nijāṁbike dēvakidēvigātmajarvviprakuḷō
dbhavarjjanisida varanūrttigaḷalli padmanābhapprabhanagrajaṁganujarā basavayyanudāttabhāskarāṁtakapprathitaprakāśarene māgoḷadoḷtaḷedarnniraṁ
taraṁ . viḷasaddugdābdhiyoḷkaustubhamuḍupatikaḷpadrumaṁ supratīkaṁgele puṭṭirppante padmayyana vanite mahāprakhya
caṁḍāṁbikākhyōjvaḷakukṣikṣīravārāśiyoḷatimudadiṁ puṭṭidarpputrarudyudbaḷakāmaṁ nārasiṁhaṁganujaneseva saṁkaṇnanuddāmamarmmaṁ .
piriduṁ brahma(ṁ)dharācakradoḷeseyaluke(ṁ)ndartthiyiṁ māḍisiṭṭa(ṁ)ntiraludyanmāgoḷagrāmada sameyada marmmāṁkanudghattrikūṭōtkaradiṁ dēvālyamaṁ
māḍisi girīśanupēṁdrāhvayārkkapratiṣThe sthiramāgalmāḍidaṁ dēvakiya pati mahākhyāta kāmānujātaṁ . ka . Ā nāḷprabhuvina su
te bhuvidānōmṁnate cauḍiyakkananujaṁ priyasanmāni guṇaratnavibdhanidhānātmaja sōmanamaḷakīrttilalāmaṁ . mattaṁ . taraṇige tējōvibhavaṁ
muraripugudyutsudarśanaṁ puṭṭuvavolu haribhaktamarmmarājana varasutanudiyisida padmanābha mahātmaṁ . svasti śrīmatu śakavarṣa 1131
neya śuklasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śuddha paurṇnami sōmavāre sōmagrahaṇa karkkāṭakasaṁkramaṇa vyatīpātamintī mahātithiyandu śrīmatu sameyadagaru
ḍa marmmarasa traimūrttidēvara pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi māgoḷadūraḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājananinnūrvva svāmigaḷa śrīpādakke suvarṇnapu
®pamanikki namaskāraṁ māḍalā mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ . hiriyamāṇikyabhaṁḍāri siṁgayyanuṁ . śrīsōmanāthadēvarggaṁ . prasannakēśavadēvarggaṁ sū
ryadēvarggaṁ Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōganaivēdyādiśrīkāryyakkaṁ sarbbābādhaparihāravāgi kuḷamaṁ kaḍidu biṭṭa bhūmi . rāmēśvaradēvara hūdōṁṭadiṁ mūḍa
hādariya maṇalu mattareraḍu manneyageṟeya kōḍiyiṁ teṁka tōṭagaṭṭu mattaroṁdu Ā keṟeya keḷage gadde mattareraḍu Ā keṟeya keḷage tōṭa ma
ttaroṁdu maṇalakaṭṭiyiṁ paḍuva kariyamāgi mattaru mūṟu . nāgarakeṟeya keḷage narasiṁhadēvara dāriyiṁ paḍuva mattarondu . haṁdeyageṁgāḍu
mattaru mūṟu Alliṁ paḍuva kaggalliṁ baḍaga keṁgāḍu mattarēḷu . bāduṁbeya kaṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa hiriyōṇiyiṁ baḍaga keṁgāḍu mattareraḍu .
Alliṁ mūḍa hiriyōṇiyiṁ baḍaga beḷugalla keṁgāḍu mattaru nālku . gaḷagevuṇaseyiṁ mūḍa hiriyōṇiya dāriyiṁ baḍaga
keṁgāḍu mattaru nālku Aṇilageṟeyōṇiyiṁ paḍuva nāgeyageṁgāḍu mattaru nālku © Ūraḍeyara śrīmānyada bhūmi hadineṁṭara hase
geyalli hiriyamodala Aṇnayyanappayyana bhāge mattaru nālku kaṁbha nālnuṟayvattu . Ā modala guṁḍadēvapeddigaḷa bhāge ma
ttaru nālku kaṁbha nālnūṟayvattu . mattavā modala sōmēśvarabhaṭṭara bhāge mattaru nālku kambha nālnūṟayvattu . Ā hasugeyalli kiṟi
yamodala caṁdramaṁciyaṇnaṁgaḷa peddayyana bhāge mattaru nālku . Antāsthaḷa mattaru hadinēḷu kambha nālnūṟayvattu . Alliṁ teṁkalu
Ippattanālkaṟa hasugeyalli hiriyamodala guṁḍadēvapeddigaḷa bhāge mattarāṟu hadineṁṭaṟa hasugeyalli hiriya- . vāsudēvaśaṇaṁgiyara
modala pālapeddigaḷa sāvidēvabhaṭṭara bhāge mattaru nālku kaṁbhanānūṟayvattuSome space is left blank here.
kēśiyaṇnaṁgaḷu koṭṭagadde manneyageṟeya keḷage mattaroṁdu . Elavasageṟeya keḷage tuyyalugeyi mattaru nālku kaṁbha nānūṟayvattu .
mammarasaraḷiya gaṁḍaguḍiya padumayya biṭṭa gottina huṇiseya keṁgāḍu keyi mattaru nālku . gōnatevara kanneyageyi mattaru mūṟu .
nālku nāḍugaḷu neradaṟuvattu hēṟuvettiṁge sarbbābādhaparihāravāgi traimūrtidēvargge naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭaru . Ī dharmamanūraḍeya pramukhavinnūrbba
ruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vāpi dānātśrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamapāpnōti pāḷanādacyutaṁ padam . Intī dharmamanāvanānumorbbaṁ
pratipāḷisidātaṁ gaṁge vāraṇāsi gayeyarghyatīrtha kurukṣētrameṁba nikhiḷamahātīrtthagaḷoḷu sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ suvarṇna
diṁ paṁcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsirbba brāhmaṇarigubhayamukhiyaṁ koṭṭa phalamakku . Ī dharmamanāvanānumorbbanaḷidātanā tīrtha
dalā kavilegaḷanā brāhmaṇarumaṁ svahastadiṁ konda paṁcamahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattam vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dhammasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ . sarbbānētān bhāvinaḥ
pārtthivēṁdrānbūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . traimūrtidēvarggūraḍeyara māneṇneyotte hoḷaliseṭṭiya kētana gā
ṇakke gadyāṇamūṟu . goneya sōmana gāṇakke gadyāṇaṁ mūṟu . noṇabara cauḍayana gāṇakke gadyāṇaṁ nālku Antu ga 10 naṁdādīvigege .
dēviṁgeṟeya keḷage mammanaṇnaṁgaḷa makkaḷu kāmayyana maga bācayyaṁ biṭṭa mattareraḍu nābhayyana maga padmanābha biṭṭa mattareraḍu
bācayanāyakana maga duggayya bammayya biṭṭa dēvara dāriyiṁ mūḍa gadde mattarondu .
matta dēvigeṟeya keḷage mahājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa mattaru mūṟu .
Digital edition of SII 9.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
